flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at St. John Fisher University rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($20.7k → $24.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at St. John Fisher University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.4k → $41.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at St. John Fisher University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).
